payload.answer: This is ambiguous because both time references are relative: “last Friday” and “next month.” I can offer repair options, but I won’t commit a durable memory from this alone.
citations: Sam said last Friday that he is leaving Goldman next month
repair_options: Record the statement as an uncommitted note with both relative time references preserved.
Ask for the exact Friday date and the exact month before saving anything.
If you want a memory, convert it to an absolute-date statement using the reference date you intended.
Keep it as a source quote rather than a factual commitment about Sam’s departure timing.
